subject: [Urgent Ian Approval Needed] Soo Wan Cheng | Regional Cross Border, Business Intelligence, Financial Planning & Analytics Team - Corporate, FTE - Associate, Cross Border Ecommerce

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

As aligned with Shuning and C&B, we would like to seek your approval for
the following offer, based on the proposal below, this is considered a *Normal
Offer*:

To propose SGD 4800 (at P12 of associate salary band) monthly according to
Shopee's new Fresh Grad pay range

1. Package pay position is *min to P25* (Interview grade A; NUS, 4.27/5.00,
offer scope is under Reg CB FP&A)
2. As aligned with Shuning, this backfill hire is necessary, as Faye's team
has recently lost 2 members (one internal transfer outbound case and one
resignation)
